content.thinking:
Let me understand the task:
1. There's a demo application running in the `demo` namespace on port 5678, serving only the root path "/"
2. I need to create a Service and Ingress to expose it at `http://demo.example.com/app`
3. Use nginx ingress class
4. Don't modify the application Deployment
5. The test uses path `/app` which needs to be rewritten to `/` since the app only serves "/"

Let me start by exploring the current state of the cluster.

content.text: Let me first check the current state of the demo namespace and the application.

input.description: Check all resources in demo namespace

input.command: kubectl -n demo get deploy -o yaml 2>&1 | head -60
input.description: Get deployment details in demo namespace

apiVersion: v1
items:
- apiVersion: apps/v1
  kind: Deployment
  metadata:
    annotations:
      deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
      kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
        {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"Deployment","metadata":{"annotations":{},"labels":{"app":"demo-app"},"name":"demo-app","namespace":"demo"},"spec":{"replicas":1,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"demo-app"}},"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"demo-app"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["sh","-c","mkdir -p /www\necho hello \u003e /www/index.html\nhttpd -f -p 5678 -h /www\n"],"image":"busybox:1.36","name":"demo-app","ports":[{"containerPort":5678,"name":"http"}]}]}}}}
    creationTimestamp: "2026-06-26T05:52:54Z"
    generation: 1
    labels:
      app: demo-app
    name: demo-app
    namespace: demo
    resourceVersion: "265307"
    uid: 47f154b1-3233-4f61-b782-3b0b3f63c61d
  spec:
    progressDeadlineSeconds: 600
    replicas: 1
    revisionHistoryLimit: 10
    selector:
      matchLabels:
        app: demo-app
    strategy:
      rollingUpdate:
        maxSurge: 25%
        maxUnavailable: 25%
      type: RollingUpdate
    template:
      metadata:
        creationTimestamp: null
        labels:
          app: demo-app
      spec:
        containers:
        - command:
          - sh
          - -c
          - |
            mkdir -p /www
            echo hello > /www/index.html
            httpd -f -p 5678 -h /www
          image: busybox:1.36
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          name: demo-app
          ports:
          - containerPort: 5678
            name: http
            protocol: TCP
          resources: {}
          terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
          terminationMessagePolicy: File
        dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
        restartPolicy: Always
        schedulerName: default-scheduler
        securityContext: {}
        terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
  status:
    availableReplicas: 1
